_comment: These two properties are appended INSIDE the Product entity from A.2, after the offers block. Do not ship as a standalone entity. Do not ship at all unless the product carries at least five real reviews.

aggregateRating.ratingValue: {{ AVERAGE_RATING — to one decimal place, e.g. 4.7 }}
aggregateRating.ratingCount: {{ TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_RATINGS — includes one-tap star ratings without text }}
aggregateRating.reviewCount: {{ TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_WRITTEN_REVIEWS — ratings with text content only }}

review.reviewBody: {{ REVIEW_TEXT — direct from the review platform, do not edit }}
